accurate.why: All provisions accurately described; using 'noncitizens' rather than the bill's 'illegal aliens' is an accurate neutral paraphrase, not an error.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the reporting requirement on border impacts on law enforcement.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The bill creates a new reporting requirement rather than amending existing law.

major_provisions_covered.why: All seven report elements and the congressional findings thoroughly covered.

objective_tone.why: Neutral framing maintained; describes partisan findings factually without endorsing them.

concise.why: Somewhat verbose; includes the full evidence lifecycle phrasing and other granular detail from the bill that exceed what a summary typically needs.

correct_entities.why: Attorney General and Congress correctly identified.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
